name: Heat Collection
pages: Use heat collector to collect heat power from $(thing)heat-collectable blocks$(). Heat-collectable block is heated blocks and some special blocks. For example, $(item)Uranium Block$()、$(item)Plutonium Block$().

pages.text: $(item)Heat Collector$() is the core component of the power generation facility, with a power upper limit of 4096KW. The scope of work is 5x5x5 centered on itself. The heat-collectable blocks in scope decided the power generation of the heat collector. Different heat-collectable block can produce different count of heat power. The cycle is 1 seconds by default.

pages: Some heat-collectable block will cooldown and change itself after heat-collecting. Here are these blocks:$(li)$(item)Magma Block$()→$(item)Netherrack$()+2kW$(li)$(item)Lit Campfire$()→$(item)Unlit Campfire$()+4kW$(li)$(item)Lava$()→$(item)Obsidian$()+4kW

pages.text: Some heat-collectable blocks will not change after heat-collecting. Here are these blocks:$(li)$(item)Uranium Block$():2kW$(li)$(item)Ember Metal Block$():4kW$(li)$(item)Plutonium Block$():8kW$()$(li)$(l:advanced/heated_block)Any Heated Block$() (Will cooldown by itself. Not affected by the collector.)$(br)The effects of heating blocks of different grades are as follows:$(li)Heated:4kW $(li)Redhot:16kW $(li)Glowing:64kW $(li)Incandescent:256kW

pages: 虽然加热方法众多，但前中期可用于发电的仅有以下两种：$(li)太阳能发电 $(li)油离子发电

pages.title: 太阳能发电
pages.text: 通过大量$(item)定日镜$()可以将太阳能收集到可加热方块上作为热能再被集热器吸收。$(br2)优点是耗材简单，且无须后续投入，但是占地较大，且光路上不可有方块阻挡。$(br2)$(l:advanced/heated_block#heliostats)点我$()查看具体数值。
燃烧原油发热需要大量的肉，但是发电量绝对够本。$(br2)优点是占地面积小，效率高，但是需要持续消耗肉类，需要配套的牧场/刷怪塔/刷怪笼。$(br2)$(l:advanced/heated_block#plasma_jets)点我$()查看具体数值。
